zh.lifeSummary: 當Indie de Toulouse於1192年7月出生在法國奧其坦尼豪-加洛圖勞斯時，她的父親Raymond VI de Toulouse35歲，母親Béatrice de Béziers37歲。她和Bertrand de L'isle  Jourdain至少有1個女兒。她去世於1249年9月27日在法國波特-哈倫斯維安利斯萊-喬爾達享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Indie de Toulouse于1192年7月出生在法国奧其坦尼豪-加洛圖勞斯时，她的父亲Raymond VI de Toulouse35岁，母亲Béatrice de Béziers37岁。她和Bertrand de L'isle  Jourdain至少有1个女儿。她去世于1249年9月27日在法国波特-哈倫斯維安利斯萊-喬爾達享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Toulouse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Monique, Camile, Emile, Gilles, Marcel, Rosaire.

French and English: habitational name from Toulouse, the name of several places in the southwestern part of France, most notably the city in Haute-Garonne, the capital of this French department and of the region of Occitanie.

nameMeanings.name: Indie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name of the subcontinent, used as the name of a character in  Margaret Mitchell's  novel Gone with the Wind (  1936 ). In the case of India Hicks, Lord Mountbatten's granddaughter, the name was chosen because of her family's association with the subcontinent.

en.lifeSummary: When Indie de Toulouse was born in July 1192, in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, France, her father, Raymond VI de Toulouse, was 35 and her mother, Béatrice de Béziers, was 37. She had at least 1 daughter with Bertrand de L'isle  Jourdain. She died on 27 September 1249, in L'Isle-Jourdain, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Indie de Toulouse est née en juillet 1192, à Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, France, son père, Raymond VI de Toulouse, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Béatrice de Béziers, avait 37 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Bertrand de L'isle  Jourdain. Elle est décédée le 27 septembre 1249, à L'Isle-Jourdain, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Indie de Toulouse im Juli 1192 in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raymond VI de Toulouse 35 und ihre Mutter Béatrice de Béziers 37. Sie hatte mit Bertrand de L'isle  Jourdain mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 27. September 1249 im Alter von 57 Jahren in L'Isle-Jourdain, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Indie de Toulouse è nata il nel luglio 1192 nel Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Francia, sua padre, Raymond VI de Toulouse, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Béatrice de Béziers, aveva 37 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Bertrand de L'isle  Jourdain. Morì il 27 settembre 1249, nel L'Isle-Jourdain, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Indie de Toulouseが1192年7月にフランスオクシタニーハウテ-ガーオントウロウゼで生まれた時，父Raymond VI de Toulouseは35歳，母Béatrice de Béziersは37歳であった。彼女はBertrand de L'isle  Jourdainとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1249年9月27日にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンル'イスレ-ジョウルダインで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Indie de Toulouse(이)가 1192년 7월 프랑스 옥시탠이 하테-가니 토우루스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raymond VI de Toulouse(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Béatrice de Béziers(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 Bertrand de L'isle  Jourdain(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1249년 9월 27일 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 '이슬레-조우르다인에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.July 1192–27 September 1249: 1192 оны Долоодугаар сар–1249 оны Есдүгээр сарын 27

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Indie de Toulouse nasceu em julho de 1192, em Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, França, seu pai, Raymond VI de Toulouse, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice de Béziers, tinha 37 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Bertrand de L'isle  Jourdain. Ela faleceu em 27 de setembro de 1249, em L'Isle-Jourdain, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Indie de Toulouse родилась июль 1192 г. в местности тоулоус, хауте-гаронн, окситани, Франция, её отцу по имени Raymond VI de Toulouse было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrice de Béziers, 37. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Bertrand de L'isle  Jourdain. Она умерла 27 сентября 1249 г. в местности л'исле-джоурдеин, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Indie de Toulouse nació en julio de 1192, en Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Francia, su papá, Raymond VI de Toulouse, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Béatrice de Béziers, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Bertrand de L'isle  Jourdain. Murió el 27 de septiembre de 1249, en L'Isle-Jourdain, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, a la edad de 57 años.
